Title: ftp_put
Feature: integerftp_put(server, user, pass, local_file_name, remote_file_name, is_pasv)
Description: FTP put command; Virtuoso FTP client

Virtuoso has FTP client functionality, that can be used inside Virtuoso/PL.  
    This Virtuoso function mimics the FTP put command.  As with any PL, this can be combined with Web Services and SOAP.
